title: 2023年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What did you do last weekend?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went to Forest Park.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh, that park is beautiful.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「あの公園は綺麗ね」に1の「お気に入りの場所」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お気に入り」→正解。2「1時間ある」→無関係。3「後でやる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Mike.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Tracy. Is that a new phone?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah, I bought it yesterday.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「昨日買ったの」に3の「かっこいいね」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今朝送った」→無関係。2「まだ」→不自然。3「かっこいい」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Have you seen this movie yet?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. I saw it last week.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How was it?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どうだった？」に1の「面白かった」が感想として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「面白かった」→正解。2「2時間半」→長さの答え。3「7ドルだけ」→値段の答え。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look happy, Peter.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah, I got into Carlton University.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Well done! What are you going to study?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何を勉強するの？」に1の「ヨーロッパ史」が適切。
highlights: What are you going to study
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ヨーロッパ史」→正解。2「1日3時間」→時間の答え。3「頑張る」→科目の答えでない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you need help, Carl?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. Can you try this soup?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hmm. I think there isn't enough pepper.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I'll put some more in, then.
questions.explanation: 「コショウが足りない」に3の「じゃあもう少し入れる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「イタリア料理が好き」→無関係。2「スーパーに行った」→無関係。3「もう少し入れる」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look lost. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm looking for the Garden Hotel.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It's on the next block.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「次のブロックだよ」に2の「助かりました」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「出張で」→聞いてない。2「助かりました」→正解。3「遅かった」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Alex, where are you going?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To the park to play soccer.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, but let's have dinner at six.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「6時に夕食よ」に2の「それまでに帰る」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「行ったことある」→無関係。2「それまでに帰る」→正解。3「僕のサッカーボール」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Could you take this chair outside?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You're so helpful. Thanks.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ありがとう」に1の「どういたしまして」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「どういたしまして」→正解。2「庭で」→無関係。3「私も」→不自然。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Jane, how was your trip to Mexico?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you go again?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「また行く？」に3の「来年かな」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「旅行楽しんで」→自分の旅行。2「新しいパスポート」→無関係。3「来年かも」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, can you please bring me a red pencil?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm drawing a picture.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「絵を描いてるの」に1の「見たいな」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「見たい」→正解。2「机の上」→場所の答え。3「一緒に行ける」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look sad, Bob. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My friend Mike called. He can't come to my birthday party tonight.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no! Why not?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He caught a cold.

questions.question: Why is Bob sad?
choices: He forgot to buy a present.
Mike can't come to his party.
No one liked his birthday cake.
questions.explanation: 「マイクがパーティーに来れない」から悲しい。
highlights: He can't come to my birthday party
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「プレゼント忘れた」→言及なし。2「母が風邪」→マイク。3「マイクが来れない」→正解。4「ケーキ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want to go to a movie?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure, Mom. But I want to finish my homework first.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. The movie starts at three.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's leave at 2:30.

questions.question: What time does the movie start?
questions.explanation: 「映画は3時から」。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you going to the concert tomorrow night, Sue?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, my aunt and I are going together. How about you, Tom?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I can't go, but my brother and my cousin are going.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I see.

questions.question: Who will Sue go to the concert with?
questions.explanation: 「叔母と一緒に行く」。
highlights: my aunt and I are going together
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「兄弟」→トムの兄弟。2「叔母」→正解。3「トム」→行けない。4「トムのいとこ」→トムの。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is there any dessert today, Mom?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I made an apple pie.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I have some now?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, Bob. You have to wait until dinnertime.

questions.question: What does Bob want to do now?
questions.explanation: 「今食べていい？」→デザートを食べたい。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「遊びに行く」→言及なし。2「夕食を作る」→言及なし。3「母を手伝う」→言及なし。4「デザートを食べる」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello, Mary Smith speaking.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi. It's Todd. Sorry, I can't come to work today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh. What's the matter?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My son has a fever. I need to take care of him.

questions.question: What will Todd do today?
questions.explanation: 「息子の世話をする」。
highlights: I need to take care of him
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「遅く出勤」→休む。2「早退」→出勤しない。3「息子の世話」→正解。4「医者に行く」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I need notebooks for my project, Mom.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I have two here.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks, but I need five.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, I'll buy three more tonight.

questions.question: How many notebooks will the woman buy?
questions.explanation: 「あと3冊買う」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2冊」→家にある分。2「3冊」→正解。3「4冊」→言及なし。4「5冊」→必要な合計数。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hey, Mark. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I can't find my pen.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is it in your bag?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I think it's on my desk at home.

questions.question: What is the boy's problem?
choices: He doesn't have his pen now.
questions.explanation: 「ペンが見つからない」→今持っていない。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ペンがない」→正解。2「カバンをなくした」→カバンにはない。3「机を壊した」→言及なし。4「教科書が家に」→ペン。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is that a new watch?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. My mom bought it for me.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want a watch like that.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You should ask for one for your birthday.

questions.question: Who has a new watch?
questions.explanation: 「うん、母が買ってくれた」→男の子が持っている。
highlights: My mom bought it for me
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「男の子」→正解。2「女の子」→欲しがっている。3「男の子の母」→買った人。4「女の子の母」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I hope I do well on the math test.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Me, too. It's in two days. Are you ready?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Almost. I should study for three or four more hours.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good luck!

questions.question: When is the math test?
questions.explanation: 「あと2日後」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1日後」→言及なし。2「2日後」→正解。3「3日後」→勉強時間。4「4日後」→勉強時間。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You'll be 12 next month, Ellie. Do you want to have a party?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, I want to invite 15 friends!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Our apartment isn't very big. How about 10?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, Dad.

questions.question: How many friends will Ellie invite?
questions.explanation: 「10人はどう？」「OK」と合意。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Kazu is good at sports. He is on the swimming team at his high school, and he plays golf on weekends. He hopes to become a professional golfer after university.

questions.question: What does Kazu want to do in the future?
questions.explanation: 「プロゴルファーになりたい」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「プロゴルファー」→正解。2「水泳部」→すでに所属。3「子供にスポーツを教える」→言及なし。4「大学で働く」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: The weather has been strange this week. It was sunny and warm on Tuesday, but the next day it snowed. Then, it rained all Thursday and Friday.

questions.question: When did it snow?
questions.explanation: 「火曜の翌日＝水曜に雪が降った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「火曜」→晴れ。2「水曜」→正解。3「木曜」→雨。4「金曜」→雨。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: George usually washes his mother's car on Saturdays. Last Saturday, he had a football game, so he asked his sister to wash it. She wasn't happy, but she did it.

questions.question: Who washed the car last Saturday?
questions.explanation: 「姉に頼んで洗ってもらった」。
highlights: he asked his sister to wash it
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ジョージ」→試合があった。2「母」→言及なし。3「姉」→正解。4「父」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sarah went to a film festival and saw three movies. On the first day, she saw a musical. The next day, she saw a horror movie. But her favorite was a comedy about a dog.

questions.question: Which movie did Sarah like the most?
questions.explanation: 「お気に入りは犬のコメディ」。
highlights: her favorite was a comedy about a dog
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ホラー」→2日目。2「アクション」→言及なし。3「ミュージカル」→1日目。4「コメディ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I love music. I play the piano, and I also play the drums in a band. However, I can't sing well, so I started taking lessons. My teacher is great.

questions.question: What is the man trying to do?
questions.explanation: 「歌が上手くないのでレッスンを始めた」。
highlights: I can't sing well, so I started taking lessons
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「歌の練習」→正解。2「音楽教師になる」→言及なし。3「ピアノを売る」→言及なし。4「バンドに入る」→すでに所属。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I had lunch with my sister yesterday. She told me about her new math teacher. After that, I told her about my new basketball coach and my field trip to the art museum.

questions.question: What did the boy's sister talk about yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「姉は新しい数学の先生の話をした」。
highlights: She told me about her new math teacher
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「好きな博物館」→弟の話。2「バスケのコーチ」→弟の話。3「遠足」→弟の話。4「数学の先生」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Jim had a headache this morning, so he asked his sister to bring him some tea from the convenience store. She bought him some mango ice cream, too.

questions.question: What did Jim ask his sister to do?
questions.explanation: 「コンビニからお茶を買ってきてと頼んだ」。
highlights: asked his sister to bring him some tea
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「店で会う」→持ってきてもらう。2「果物を切る」→言及なし。3「お茶を買う」→正解。4「医者に電話」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Cathy's uncle made some beef soup for dinner today. Cathy doesn't eat meat, so she made some salad and rice. Cathy's mother made apple pie for dessert.

questions.question: What did Cathy's uncle make?
questions.explanation: 「叔父がビーフスープを作った」。
highlights: Cathy's uncle made some beef soup
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スープ」→正解。2「ご飯」→キャシー。3「サラダ」→キャシー。4「アップルパイ」→母。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Everyone, please follow me. First, we'll see the monkeys and gorillas. Then we'll see some other animals from Africa, like lions and elephants.

questions.question: Where is the woman talking?
questions.explanation: 猿、ゴリラ、ライオン、象→動物園。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「動物園」→正解。2「学校」→動物の見学。3「コンサート」→言及なし。4「書店」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Brianna took two tests on Friday, and then she had a soccer tournament on Saturday. She feels tired and a little sick now. Her mother told her to rest at home today, so she will.

questions.question: Why is Brianna staying home today?
choices: To take care of her mother.
questions.explanation: 「疲れて具合が悪いから家で休む」。
highlights: Her mother told her to rest at home
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「テスト勉強」→もう終わった。2「休むため」→正解。3「母の世話」→母が言った。4「大会の準備」→もう終わった。
